bio.summary: Data engineer turning ML/GenAI engineer. Focused on RAG, agents, and data products.

projects.title: RAG Portfolio
projects.description:
**Overview:** A RAG-powered personal site with Qdrant + FastAPI. Built to answer questions about my projects and experience.

**Architecture:** Next.js frontend + FastAPI backend on AWS Lambda; Qdrant Cloud for vector search; FastEmbed for CPU-friendly embeddings.
projects.problem: Make recruiters instantly see relevant projects and skills from a single query.
projects.architecture: Frontend: Next.js. Backend: FastAPI on AWS Lambda. Vector DB: Qdrant. Embeddings: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5. Infra: Docker + GitHub Actions.
projects.challenges: Low-latency search on CPU, consistent metadata for filtering, deterministic chunk IDs.

outcomes.metrics: Sub-200ms query times locally; ~90% top-3 hit rate in smoke tests.
outcomes.impact: Faster recruiter discovery; clearer, filterable portfolio evidence.

experience.description: Worked on analytics pipelines, dashboards, and quality checks across clinical datasets.
responsibilities: - Built SQL pipelines and validated data quality.
- Collaborated with engineering teams to optimize queries.
achievements: - Reduced report generation time by 40% with optimized transformations.
